source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/05_Blue (G1417MCW 외 7종)/▶ 시험소/06. Usability 보완_250103/06. 제품 회로도/BASE.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Circuit schematic package for the XDAQ IMX8-PLUS mother board, including connectors, IMX8 interfaces, devices, power trees, battery charger, and I2C flow.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports engineering and regulatory traceability for product circuitry, interface design, power architecture, and component identification.
keyPoints: The document identifies an XDAQ IMX8-PLUS Mother Board and lists 19 sheets including block diagram, B2B/B2W connectors, IMX8, base devices, power sections, battery charger, and I2C flow.
Revision table states Rev1.0 release dated 18/03/2024; sheet title blocks also show Rev A.
Most sheets are dated Thursday, July 18, 2024, while sheet 18 is dated Monday, July 22, 2024.
The design includes USB3.0, Ethernet, PCIe M.2, SD Card, debug, WiFi, MIPI, ROIC, and GATE functional blocks.
Power architecture references battery voltage 9.0V~13.2V, adapter/USB PD 15V, battery chargers, IMX8 power, ROIC power, GATE power, XDAQ power, and bias power.

evidence.claim: The source is a 19-sheet XDAQ IMX8-PLUS Mother Board schematic/block diagram package.
evidence.evidenceText: XDAQ IMX8-PLUS WIFI Mother Board Mother Board Block Diagram ... Page Description ... 1 ... 19 I2C_Flow

evidence.claim: The revision table states Rev1.0 release dated 18/03/2024.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev Date Page Description 1.0 18/03/2024 All Rev1.0 Release
evidence.pageTarget: XDAQ IMX8-PLUS Mother Board Revision History

evidence.claim: Sheet title blocks identify Rev A on multiple sheets.
evidence.evidenceText: Title Size Document Number Rev Date: Sheet of <Doc> A <Title> A4 1 19 Thursday, July 18, 2024
evidence.pageTarget: XDAQ IMX8-PLUS Mother Board Revision History

evidence.claim: Most sheets are dated Thursday, July 18, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: A4 1 19 Thursday, July 18, 2024
evidence.pageTarget: XDAQ IMX8-PLUS Mother Board Document Date

evidence.claim: Sheet 18 is dated Monday, July 22, 2024.
evidence.evidenceText: A3 18 19 Monday, July 22, 2024

evidence.claim: The functional blocks include ROIC, GATE, MIPI, CONFIG, USB3.0, Ethernet, PCIe M.2, SD Card, Debug, and WiFi.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC GATE MIPI CONFIG USB3.0 ETHERNET PCIe M.2 SD CARD DEBUG XDAQ IMX8-PLUS WIFI
evidence.pageTarget: XDAQ IMX8-PLUS Mother Board Block Diagram

evidence.claim: The B2B ROIC connectors are JM1 and JM2.
evidence.evidenceText: B2B Con_ROIC : JM1, JM2

evidence.claim: The B2B GATE/MIPI connectors are JM3 and JM4.
evidence.evidenceText: B2B Con_GATE,MIPI : JM3, JM4

evidence.claim: The B2W ROIC connectors are CN1, CN2, CN3, and CN4.
evidence.evidenceText: B2W Con_ROIC : CN1, CN2, CN3, CN4
evidence.pageTarget: B2W Connector CN1 CN2 CN3 CN4

evidence.claim: The GATE connector sheet notes 140um Static for 1417/1717 with Gate IC 6CH and 100um Static for 1417/1717 with Gate IC 9CH.
evidence.evidenceText: 140um Static (1417,1717) / Gate IC 6CH 100um Static (1417,1717) / Gate IC 9CH

evidence.claim: The IMX8 sheet includes USB, Ethernet, MIPI CSI, PCIe, SD, I2C, SPI, and UART debug signals.
evidence.evidenceText: USB1_TXP ... ETH_TRX_P0 ... MIPI_CSI#A_DATA0_P ... PCIE#A_TX0_N ... USDHC#A_CLK ... I2C#A_SCL ... SPI#A_CS0 ... UART#_DEBUG_RX

evidence.claim: The design includes GPIO expanders at I2C addresses 0x20 and 0x21.
evidence.evidenceText: GPIO EXPANDER I2C ADD : 0x21 ... GPIO EXPANDER I2C ADD : 0x20

evidence.claim: Base device #1 includes RTC at 0x68, gyro at 0x69, and temperature sensor at 0x48.
evidence.evidenceText: I2C ADDR: (0x68) I2C ADDR: (0x69) RTC GYRO TEMP I2C ADDR: (0x48)

evidence.claim: Base device #2 specifies Ethernet 100 ohm impedance and USB 90 ohm differential pair layout.
evidence.evidenceText: Layout: 100ohm, ETHERNET SIGNAL Impedance : 100ohm ... Layout: 90ohm, USB signals length equal

evidence.claim: Base device #3 includes a USB client, four hall sensors, and EEPROM at address 0x50.
evidence.evidenceText: USB CLIENT ... 4 POINT Hall Sensor EEPROM ADDR : (0X50) Write Addr : (0xA0) Read Addr : (0xA1)

evidence.claim: The base power tree uses battery voltage 9.0V~13.2V and adapter/USB PD 15V input references.
evidence.evidenceText: BAT VOLTAGE (9.0V~13.2V) ADAPTER, USB PD (15V)

evidence.claim: ROIC power input range is 8V~17V and includes 5.5V/6A and 3.0V/6A ROIC power rails.
evidence.evidenceText: INPUT RANGE (8V~17V) ROIC_PWR (5.5V/6A) ROIC_PWR (3.0V/6A)

evidence.claim: GATE power includes VGH 15V/1A and VGL -6.2V/1A references.
evidence.evidenceText: to GATE(FFC) / 1A (3.3V/1.5A) VGH_15V/1A VGL_N6.2V/1A

evidence.claim: XDAQ power has input range 8V~17V and XDAQ_PWR 3.0V/6A.
evidence.evidenceText: INPUT RANGE (8V~17V) XDAQ_PWR (3.0V/6A)

evidence.claim: The I2C flow lists IMX8 buses I2C#A, I2C#B, and I2C#C with devices including PCA9534, SSD1306, DS1340, TMP75A, M24256E, and battery-related functions.
evidence.evidenceText: IMX8 PCA9534 Add:0X20 I2C to GPIO I2C#A I2C#B I2C#C ... SSD1306 Add:0X3C OLED DS1340 Add:0X68 RTC TMP75A Add:0X48 TEMP ... M24256E Add:0X50 EEPROM

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction is present in the extracted source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
No complete product model is confirmed in the source text; numeric references such as 1417 and 1717 appear to describe variants or geometry rather than full product models.
Revision metadata is conflicting or mixed: revision table shows 1.0/Rev1.0 release, while sheet title blocks show Rev A or placeholder RevCode/RevCo.
Document date metadata is mixed: most sheets show Thursday, July 18, 2024, while sheet 18 shows Monday, July 22, 2024.
Some title block fields are placeholders such as <Doc>, <Title>, <RevCo>, and <RevCode>.
OCR/text extraction quality is imperfect, with repeated title blocks, spacing artifacts, and possible recognition errors such as 'Tilte' and 'BAIS_POWER'.
